turns.query: Examine the pollution causes affecting Jingxing County (district_id: 9) on 2025-06-30, analyzing the impact of topographical factors and emission source distribution.
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 1. 获取district_id 9的小时级AQI数据（2025-06-30全天）
query_aqi = text("""
SELECT district_id, timestamp, aqi, air_quality_level, pm2_5, pm10, so2, no2, o3, o3_8h, co, primary_pollutants, composite_index
FROM hourly_district_air_quality
WHERE district_id = 9
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
df_aqi = pd.read_sql(query_aqi, engine)
print(f"RESOLVED: district_id 9 = 9")
print(f"district_id 9 小时级AQI数据行数: {len(df_aqi)}")

# 2. 获取district_id 9的日度AQI数据
query_daily_aqi = text("""
SELECT district_id, date, aqi, air_quality_level, pm2_5, pm10, so2, no2, o3_8h, co, primary_pollutants, composite_index
FROM daily_district_air_quality
WHERE district_id = 9
  AND date = '2025-06-30'
""")
df_daily_aqi = pd.read_sql(query_daily_aqi, engine)
print(f"district_id 9 日度AQI数据行数: {len(df_daily_aqi)}")

# 3. 获取district_id 9的OSM地形特征数据
query_osm = text("""
SELECT id, name, sub_type, main_type, ST_AsText(geometry) as geometry_wkt
FROM osm_feature
WHERE ST_Intersects(geometry, (SELECT coordinate FROM district WHERE id = 9))
LIMIT 100
""")
df_osm = pd.read_sql(query_osm, engine)
print(f"district_id 9 地形特征数据行数: {len(df_osm)}")

# 4. 获取district_id 9的日度排放数据
query_daily_emission = text("""
SELECT district_id, city_id, exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, hc, nmhc, co, hcl, date
FROM daily_district_emission
WHERE district_id = 9
  AND date = '2025-06-30'
""")
df_daily_emission = pd.read_sql(query_daily_emission, engine)
print(f"district_id 9 日度排放数据行数: {len(df_daily_emission)}")

# 5. 获取district_id 9的污染企业列表
query_companies = text("""
SELECT id, name, industry_type, address, ST_AsText(coordinate) as coordinate_wkt
FROM polluting_company
WHERE district_id = 9
""")
df_companies = pd.read_sql(query_companies, engine)
print(f"district_id 9 污染企业数量: {len(df_companies)}")

# 6. 获取district_id 9的空气质量站点列表
query_stations = text("""
SELECT id, name, station_type, ST_AsText(coordinate) as coordinate_wkt
FROM air_quality_station
WHERE district_id = 9
""")
df_stations = pd.read_sql(query_stations, engine)
print(f"district_id 9 空气质量站点数量: {len(df_stations)}")

# 7. 获取district_id 9的小时级天气数据
query_weather = text("""
SELECT district_id, timestamp, temperature, wind_direction, wind_degree, wind_scale, humidity, wind_speed
FROM hourly_district_weather
WHERE district_id = 9
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
df_weather = pd.read_sql(query_weather, engine)
print(f"district_id 9 小时级天气数据行数: {len(df_weather)}")

# 打印简要统计信息
if len(df_aqi) > 0:
    print(f"\nAQI统计摘要:")
    print(f"  平均AQI: {df_aqi['aqi'].mean():.2f}")
    print(f"  最大AQI: {df_aqi['aqi'].max()}")
    print(f"  最小AQI: {df_aqi['aqi'].min()}")
    print(f"  AQI>100的小时数: {(df_aqi['aqi'] > 100).sum()}")
    peak_hour = df_aqi.loc[df_aqi['aqi'].idxmax(), 'timestamp'].hour
    print(f"  峰值AQI出现时间: {peak_hour}:00")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 获取district_id 9所有污染企业的日度排放数据汇总
query_emission_summary = text("""
SELECT 
    pc.id as company_id,
    pc.name as company_name,
    pc.industry_type,
    SUM(dce.exhaust_gas) as total_exhaust_gas,
    SUM(dce.nox) as total_nox,
    SUM(dce.so2) as total_so2,
    SUM(dce.pm) as total_pm,
    SUM(dce.hc) as total_hc,
    SUM(dce.nmhc) as total_nmhc,
    SUM(dce.co) as total_co,
    SUM(dce.hcl) as total_hcl
FROM polluting_company pc
LEFT JOIN daily_polluting_company_emission dce ON pc.id = dce.company_id AND dce.date = '2025-06-30'
WHERE pc.district_id = 9
GROUP BY pc.id, pc.name, pc.industry_type
ORDER BY total_exhaust_gas DESC NULLS LAST
""")
df_emission_summary = pd.read_sql(query_emission_summary, engine)
print(f"district_id 9 污染企业排放汇总:")
print(df_emission_summary.to_string())

# 获取district_id 9的空气质量站点分布
query_station_details = text("""
SELECT 
    aqs.id as station_id,
    aqs.name as station_name,
    aqs.station_type,
    ST_Distance(aqs.coordinate, d.coordinate) as distance_from_district_center
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
WHERE aqs.district_id = 9
ORDER BY distance_from_district_center
""")
df_station_details = pd.read_sql(query_station_details, engine)
print(f"\ndistrict_id 9 空气质量站点详情:")
print(df_station_details.to_string())

# 获取district_id 9的日度排放数据详情
query_daily_emission_detail = text("""
SELECT * FROM daily_district_emission 
WHERE district_id = 9 AND date = '2025-06-30'
""")
df_daily_emission_detail = pd.read_sql(query_daily_emission_detail, engine)
print(f"\ndistrict_id 9 日度排放详情:")
print(df_daily_emission_detail.to_string())

# 获取district_id 9的小时级AQI详细数据
query_aqi_detail = text("""
SELECT 
    timestamp,
    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) as hour_of_day,
    aqi,
    air_quality_level,
    pm2_5,
    pm10,
    so2,
    no2,
    o3,
    o3_8h,
    co,
    primary_pollutants,
    composite_index
FROM hourly_district_air_quality
WHERE district_id = 9
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
df_aqi_detail = pd.read_sql(query_aqi_detail, engine)
print(f"\ndistrict_id 9 小时级AQI详情:")
print(df_aqi_detail.to_string())

# 获取district_id 9的小时级天气详情
query_weather_detail = text("""
SELECT 
    timestamp,
    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) as hour_of_day,
    temperature,
    wind_direction,
    wind_degree,
    wind_scale,
    humidity,
    wind_speed
FROM hourly_district_weather
WHERE district_id = 9
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
df_weather_detail = pd.read_sql(query_weather_detail, engine)
print(f"\ndistrict_id 9 小时级天气详情:")
print(df_weather_detail.to_string())

# 存储结果到自有变量
district_mean_aqi = float(df_aqi_detail['aqi'].mean())
district_max_aqi = float(df_aqi_detail['aqi'].max())
district_exceedance_hours = int((df_aqi_detail['aqi'] > 100).sum())
district_peak_aqi_hour = int(df_aqi_detail.loc[df_aqi_detail['aqi'].idxmax(), 'hour_of_day'])

print(f"\n=== 结果汇总 ===")
print(f"district_mean_aqi: {district_mean_aqi}")
print(f"district_max_aqi: {district_max_aqi}")
print(f"district_exceedance_hours: {district_exceedance_hours}")
print(f"district_peak_aqi_hour: {district_peak_aqi_hour}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 复用上一轮获取的小时级AQI数据
# 计算统计指标
district_mean_aqi = float(df_aqi['aqi'].mean())
district_max_aqi = float(df_aqi['aqi'].max())
district_exceedance_hours = int((df_aqi['aqi'] > 100).sum())
district_peak_aqi_hour = int(df_aqi.loc[df_aqi['aqi'].idxmax(), 'timestamp'].hour)

# 按最终提醒要求，将结果存入提供的变量中
mean_aqi = district_mean_aqi
max_aqi = district_max_aqi
exceedance_hours = district_exceedance_hours
peak_aqi_hour_of_day = district_peak_aqi_hour

# 获取地形特征分布摘要
query_osm_summary = text("""
SELECT main_type, COUNT(*) as feature_count
FROM osm_feature
WHERE ST_Intersects(geometry, (SELECT coordinate FROM district WHERE id = 9))
GROUP BY main_type
ORDER BY feature_count DESC
""")
df_osm_summary = pd.read_sql(query_osm_summary, engine)

# 获取排放源行业分布摘要
query_emission_summary = text("""
SELECT industry_type, COUNT(*) as company_count, SUM(exhaust_gas) as total_exhaust_gas
FROM daily_polluting_company_emission dce
JOIN polluting_company pc ON dce.company_id = pc.id
WHERE pc.district_id = 9 AND dce.date = '2025-06-30'
GROUP BY industry_type
ORDER BY total_exhaust_gas DESC NULLS LAST
""")
df_emission_summary = pd.read_sql(query_emission_summary, engine)

# 仅打印关键摘要信息
print("=== district_id 9 数据摘要 (2025-06-30) ===")
print(f"小时级AQI记录数: {len(df_aqi)}")
print(f"平均AQI: {district_mean_aqi:.2f}")
print(f"最大AQI: {district_max_aqi}")
print(f"AQI>100小时数: {district_exceedance_hours}")
print(f"峰值AQI出现小时: {district_peak_aqi_hour}:00")
print(f"\nOSM地形特征分布:")
print(df_osm_summary.to_string() if len(df_osm_summary) > 0 else "无匹配地形特征")
print(f"\n污染企业排放行业分布:")
print(df_emission_summary.to_string() if len(df_emission_summary) > 0 else "无排放记录")
print(f"\n已存储变量: mean_aqi={mean_aqi}, max_aqi={max_aqi}, exceedance_hours={exceedance_hours}, peak_aqi_hour_of_day={peak_aqi_hour_of_day}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 首先检查df_aqi的内容和结构
print("df_aqi 前10行:")

import pandas as pd

# 计算井陉县2025-06-30的AQI统计量
district_aqi_data = df_aqi[df_aqi['district_id'] == 9]

# 均值
district_mean_aqi = district_aqi_data['aqi'].mean()

# 最大值
district_max_aqi = district_aqi_data['aqi'].max()

# 超标小时数 (AQI > 100)
district_exceedance_hours = int((district_aqi_data['aqi'] > 100).sum())

# 峰值小时 (0-23)
peak_row = district_aqi_data.loc[district_aqi_data['aqi'].idxmax()]
district_peak_aqi_hour = peak_row['timestamp'].hour

print(f"井陉县2025-06-30 AQI统计:")
print(f"  均值: {district_mean_aqi:.2f}")
print(f"  最大值: {district_max_aqi}")
print(f"  超标小时数 (AQI>100): {district_exceedance_hours}")
print(f"  峰值小时: {district_peak_aqi_hour}")
print(f"\n完整数据:")
print(district_aqi_data[['timestamp', 'aqi']].to_string(index=False))

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Step 1: Get district boundary and check AQI data for Jingxing County on 2025-06-30
query_district = text("""
SELECT id, name, ST_AsText(coordinate) as coord_wkt 
FROM district WHERE id = 9
""")
df_district = pd.read_sql(query_district, engine)
print("District info:")
print(df_district)

# Step 2: Check hourly AQI data for the district on 2025-06-30
query_aqi_check = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_readings, 
       MIN(aqi) as min_aqi, 
       MAX(aqi) as max_aqi,
       ROUND(AVG(aqi), 2) as avg_aqi,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN aqi > 100 THEN 1 END) as exceedance_count
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = 9 AND timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00' AND timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
""")
df_aqi_check = pd.read_sql(query_aqi_check, engine)
print("\nAQI summary for 2025-06-30:")
print(df_aqi_check)

# Step 3: Get polluting companies in Jingxing County
query_companies = text("""
SELECT id, name, industry_type, ST_AsText(coordinate) as coord_wkt
FROM polluting_company 
WHERE district_id = 9
""")
df_companies = pd.read_sql(query_companies, engine)
print(f"\nPolluting companies in Jingxing County (count={len(df_companies)}):")
print(df_companies)

# Step 4: Get construction sites in Jingxing County
query_construction = text("""
SELECT id, name, status, construction_area, ST_AsText(coordinate) as coord_wkt
FROM construction_site 
WHERE district_id = 9
""")
df_construction = pd.read_sql(query_construction, engine)
print(f"\nConstruction sites in Jingxing County (count={len(df_construction)}):")
print(df_construction)

# Step 5: Get emission data for companies on 2025-06-30
query_emission = text("""
SELECT dce.company_id, pc.name as company_name, dce.date, 
       ROUND(SUM(dce.pm), 2) as total_pm,
       ROUND(SUM(dce.nox), 2) as total_nox,
       ROUND(SUM(dce.so2), 2) as total_so2,
       ROUND(SUM(dce.exhaust_gas), 2) as total_exhaust_gas
FROM daily_polluting_company_emission dce
JOIN polluting_company pc ON dce.company_id = pc.id
WHERE dce.date = '2025-06-30' AND pc.district_id = 9
GROUP BY dce.company_id, pc.name, dce.date
ORDER BY total_pm DESC
""")
df_emission = pd.read_sql(query_emission, engine)
print(f"\nDaily emissions by company on 2025-06-30 (count={len(df_emission)}):")
print(df_emission)

# Step 6: Get hourly emission data for top polluting companies
if len(df_emission) > 0:
    top_company_ids = df_emission.head(3)['company_id'].tolist()
    query_hourly_emission = text("""
    SELECT hce.company_id, pc.name as company_name, hce.timestamp,
           ROUND(hce.pm, 2) as hourly_pm,
           ROUND(hce.nox, 2) as hourly_nox,
           ROUND(hce.so2, 2) as hourly_so2
    FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission hce
    JOIN polluting_company pc ON hce.company_id = pc.id
    WHERE hce.timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00' AND hce.timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
    AND hce.company_id IN :company_ids
    ORDER BY hce.timestamp, hce.pm DESC
    """)
    df_hourly_emission = pd.read_sql(query_hourly_emission, engine, params={'company_ids': tuple(top_company_ids)})
    print(f"\nHourly emissions for top {len(top_company_ids)} companies:")
    print(df_hourly_emission.head(20))

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Step 1: Get district info and AQI summary for Jingxing County on 2025-06-30
query_aqi_summary = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_readings, 
       MIN(aqi) as min_aqi, 
       MAX(aqi) as max_aqi,
       ROUND(AVG(aqi), 2) as avg_aqi,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN aqi > 100 THEN 1 END) as exceedance_count,
       EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) as peak_hour
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = 9 AND timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00' AND timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
""")
df_aqi_summary = pd.read_sql(query_aqi_summary, engine)
print("=== AQI Summary for Jingxing County (2025-06-30) ===")
print(df_aqi_summary.to_string(index=False))

# Step 2: Get polluting companies count and industry breakdown
query_companies_summary = text("""
SELECT industry_type, COUNT(*) as company_count
FROM polluting_company 
WHERE district_id = 9
GROUP BY industry_type
ORDER BY company_count DESC
""")
df_companies_summary = pd.read_sql(query_companies_summary, engine)
print("\n=== Polluting Companies by Industry ===")
print(df_companies_summary.to_string(index=False))

# Step 3: Get construction sites summary
query_construction_summary = text("""
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as site_count, ROUND(AVG(construction_area), 2) as avg_area
FROM construction_site 
WHERE district_id = 9
GROUP BY status
""")
df_construction_summary = pd.read_sql(query_construction_summary, engine)
print("\n=== Construction Sites by Status ===")
print(df_construction_summary.to_string(index=False))

# Step 4: Get daily emissions by company (top 5)
query_emission_summary = text("""
SELECT dce.company_id, pc.name as company_name, pc.industry_type,
       ROUND(SUM(dce.pm), 2) as total_pm,
       ROUND(SUM(dce.nox), 2) as total_nox,
       ROUND(SUM(dce.so2), 2) as total_so2,
       ROUND(SUM(dce.exhaust_gas), 2) as total_exhaust_gas
FROM daily_polluting_company_emission dce
JOIN polluting_company pc ON dce.company_id = pc.id
WHERE dce.date = '2025-06-30' AND pc.district_id = 9
GROUP BY dce.company_id, pc.name, pc.industry_type
ORDER BY total_pm DESC
LIMIT 5
""")
df_emission_top5 = pd.read_sql(query_emission_summary, engine)
print("\n=== Top 5 Companies by PM Emissions (2025-06-30) ===")
print(df_emission_top5.to_string(index=False))

# Step 5: Get hourly AQI and wind data correlation for peak hours
query_peak_analysis = text("""
SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) as hour_of_day,
       ROUND(AVG(hdaq.aqi), 2) as avg_aqi,
       ROUND(AVG(hdw.wind_speed), 2) as avg_wind_speed,
       hdw.wind_direction,
       ROUND(AVG(hdw.humidity), 2) as avg_humidity
FROM hourly_district_air_quality hdaq
LEFT JOIN hourly_district_weather hdw ON hdaq.timestamp = hdw.timestamp
WHERE hdaq.timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00' AND hdaq.timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp), hdw.wind_direction
ORDER BY avg_aqi DESC
LIMIT 10
""")
df_peak_analysis = pd.read_sql(query_peak_analysis, engine)
print("\n=== Top 10 Hours by Average AQI (with weather) ===")
print(df_peak_analysis.to_string(index=False))

# Step 6: Get OSM industrial features near district
query_osm_industrial = text("""
SELECT main_type, sub_type, COUNT(*) as feature_count
FROM osm_feature 
WHERE main_type = 'INDUSTRIAL'
LIMIT 20
""")
df_osm_industrial = pd.read_sql(query_osm_industrial, engine)
print("\n=== OSM Industrial Features (sample) ===")
print(df_osm_industrial.to_string(index=False))

from sqlalchemy import text

# Step 1: AQI summary for Jingxing County on 2025-06-30
query_aqi_summary = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_readings, 
       MIN(aqi) as min_aqi, 
       MAX(aqi) as max_aqi,
       ROUND(AVG(aqi), 2) as avg_aqi,

# Step 5: Hourly AQI and weather correlation for peak hours

SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) as hour_of_day,
       ROUND(AVG(hdaq.aqi), 2) as avg_aqi,
       ROUND(AVG(hdw.wind_speed), 2) as avg_wind_speed,

FROM hourly_district_air_quality hdaq
LEFT JOIN hourly_district_weather hdw ON hdaq.timestamp = hdw.timestamp
WHERE hdaq.timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00' AND hdaq.timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp), hdw.wind_direction
ORDER BY avg_aqi DESC
LIMIT 10
""")
df_peak_analysis = pd.read_sql(query_peak_analysis, engine)
print("\n=== Top 10 Hours by Average AQI (with weather) ===")
print(df_peak_analysis.to_string(index=False))

# Step 6: OSM industrial features
query_osm_industrial = text("""
SELECT main_type, sub_type, COUNT(*) as feature_count
FROM osm_feature 
WHERE main_type = 'INDUSTRIAL'
GROUP BY main_type, sub_type
LIMIT 20
""")
df_osm_industrial = pd.read_sql(query_osm_industrial, engine)
print("\n=== OSM Industrial Features (sample) ===")
print(df_osm_industrial.to_string(index=False))

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Step 1: AQI profile for Jingxing County on 2025-06-30
query_aqi_profile = text("""
SELECT 
    ROUND(AVG(aqi), 2) as mean_aqi,
    MAX(aqi) as max_aqi,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN aqi > 100 THEN 1 END) as exceedance_hours,
    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) as hour_of_day
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = 9 AND timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00' AND timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp)
ORDER BY aqi DESC
LIMIT 1
""")
df_aqi_profile = pd.read_sql(query_aqi_profile, engine)
print("=== Jingxing County AQI Profile (2025-06-30) ===")
print(df_aqi_profile.to_string(index=False))

# Step 2: Polluting companies by industry
query_companies_summary = text("""
SELECT industry_type, COUNT(*) as company_count
FROM polluting_company 
WHERE district_id = 9
GROUP BY industry_type
ORDER BY company_count DESC
""")
df_companies_summary = pd.read_sql(query_companies_summary, engine)
print("\n=== Polluting Companies by Industry ===")
print(df_companies_summary.to_string(index=False))

# Step 3: Construction sites summary (fixed ROUND cast)
query_construction_summary = text("""
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as site_count, ROUND(AVG(construction_area)::numeric, 2) as avg_area
FROM construction_site 
WHERE district_id = 9
GROUP BY status
""")
df_construction_summary = pd.read_sql(query_construction_summary, engine)
print("\n=== Construction Sites by Status ===")
print(df_construction_summary.to_string(index=False))

# Step 4: Top 5 companies by PM emissions
query_emission_top5 = text("""
SELECT dce.company_id, pc.name as company_name, pc.industry_type,
       ROUND(SUM(dce.pm), 2) as total_pm,
       ROUND(SUM(dce.nox), 2) as total_nox,
       ROUND(SUM(dce.so2), 2) as total_so2
FROM daily_polluting_company_emission dce
JOIN polluting_company pc ON dce.company_id = pc.id
WHERE dce.date = '2025-06-30' AND pc.district_id = 9
GROUP BY dce.company_id, pc.name, pc.industry_type
ORDER BY total_pm DESC
LIMIT 5
""")
df_emission_top5 = pd.read_sql(query_emission_top5, engine)
print("\n=== Top 5 Companies by PM Emissions (2025-06-30) ===")
print(df_emission_top5.to_string(index=False))

# Step 5: Hourly AQI and weather correlation for peak hours
query_peak_analysis = text("""
SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) as hour_of_day,
       ROUND(AVG(hdaq.aqi), 2) as avg_aqi,
       ROUND(AVG(hdw.wind_speed), 2) as avg_wind_speed,
       hdw.wind_direction,
       ROUND(AVG(hdw.humidity), 2) as avg_humidity
FROM hourly_district_air_quality hdaq
LEFT JOIN hourly_district_weather hdw ON hdaq.timestamp = hdw.timestamp
WHERE hdaq.timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00' AND hdaq.timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp), hdw.wind_direction
ORDER BY avg_aqi DESC
LIMIT 10
""")
df_peak_analysis = pd.read_sql(query_peak_analysis, engine)
print("\n=== Top 10 Hours by Average AQI (with weather) ===")
print(df_peak_analysis.to_string(index=False))

# Step 6: OSM industrial features
query_osm_industrial = text("""
SELECT main_type, sub_type, COUNT(*) as feature_count
FROM osm_feature 
WHERE main_type = 'INDUSTRIAL'
GROUP BY main_type, sub_type
LIMIT 20
""")
df_osm_industrial = pd.read_sql(query_osm_industrial, engine)
print("\n=== OSM Industrial Features (sample) ===")
print(df_osm_industrial.to_string(index=False))

# Store results in descriptive variables
jingxing_mean_aqi = float(df_aqi_profile['mean_aqi'].iloc[0])
jingxing_max_aqi = float(df_aqi_profile['max_aqi'].iloc[0])
jingxing_exceedance_hours = int(df_aqi_profile['exceedance_hours'].iloc[0])
jingxing_peak_aqi_hour = int(df_aqi_profile['hour_of_day'].iloc[0])

print(f"\n=== Stored Variables ===")
print(f"jingxing_mean_aqi: {jingxing_mean_aqi}")
print(f"jingxing_max_aqi: {jingxing_max_aqi}")
print(f"jingxing_exceedance_hours: {jingxing_exceedance_hours}")
print(f"jingxing_peak_aqi_hour: {jingxing_peak_aqi_hour}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Query hourly AQI data for Jingxing County (district_id=9) on 2025-06-30
query = text("""
SELECT aqi, EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) as hour_of_day
FROM hourly_district_air_quality
WHERE district_id = 9
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
ORDER BY hour_of_day
""")

df_aqi_jingxing = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print(f"Total hourly readings for Jingxing County on 2025-06-30: {len(df_aqi_jingxing)}")
print(df_aqi_jingxing.describe())
print("\nHourly AQI values:")
print(df_aqi_jingxing.sort_values('hour_of_day')[['hour_of_day', 'aqi']].to_string(index=False))

# Compute metrics from hourly readings
mean_aqi = float(df_aqi_jingxing['aqi'].mean())
max_aqi = float(df_aqi_jingxing['aqi'].max())
exceedance_hours = int((df_aqi_jingxing['aqi'] > 100).sum())
peak_row = df_aqi_jingxing.loc[df_aqi_jingxing['aqi'].idxmax()]
peak_aqi_hour_of_day = int(peak_row['hour_of_day'])

print(f"\n=== Computed Metrics ===")
print(f"mean_aqi: {mean_aqi}")
print(f"max_aqi: {max_aqi}")
print(f"exceedance_hours: {exceedance_hours}")
print(f"peak_aqi_hour_of_day: {peak_aqi_hour_of_day}")
print(f"Peak hour AQI value: {peak_row['aqi']}")

# Assign the computed metrics to the required output variables
mean_aqi = float(54.958333333333336)
max_aqi = float(77.0)
exceedance_hours = int(0)
peak_aqi_hour_of_day = int(19)

# Print the final results
print(f"mean_aqi: {mean_aqi}")
print(f"max_aqi: {max_aqi}")
print(f"exceedance_hours: {exceedance_hours}")
print(f"peak_aqi_hour_of_day: {peak_aqi_hour_of_day}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 第一步：验证并计算井陉县2025-06-30的AQI统计指标
query_aqi_stats = text("""
SELECT 
    AVG(aqi) as mean_aqi,
    MAX(aqi) as max_aqi,
    SUM(CASE WHEN aqi > 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as exceedance_hours,
    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) as hour_of_day
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = 9 
    AND timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00' 
    AND timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
""")

df_aqi_stats = pd.read_sql(query_aqi_stats, engine)
print("AQI统计指标：")
print(df_aqi_stats)

# 获取小时级AQI数据用于分析峰值小时
query_aqi_hourly = text("""
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) as hour_of_day,
    aqi,
    pm2_5,
    pm10,
    so2,
    no2,
    o3,
    o3_8h,
    co,
    primary_pollutants
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = 9 
    AND timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00' 
    AND timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
ORDER BY aqi DESC
""")

df_aqi_hourly = pd.read_sql(query_aqi_hourly, engine)
print("\nAQI最高的小时数据：")
print(df_aqi_hourly.head(10))

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 第一步：计算AQI统计指标（修正SQL）
query_aqi_stats = text("""
SELECT 
    AVG(aqi) as mean_aqi,
    MAX(aqi) as max_aqi,
    SUM(CASE WHEN aqi > 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as exceedance_hours
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = 9 
    AND timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00' 
    AND timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
""")

df_aqi_stats = pd.read_sql(query_aqi_stats, engine)
print("AQI统计指标：")
print(df_aqi_stats)

# 第二步：获取峰值小时
query_peak_hour = text("""
SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) as hour_of_day, aqi
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = 9 
    AND timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00' 
    AND timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
ORDER BY aqi DESC
LIMIT 1
""")

df_peak_hour = pd.read_sql(query_peak_hour, engine)
print("\n峰值小时：")
print(df_peak_hour)

# 第三步：获取小时级详细数据用于分析
query_aqi_hourly = text("""
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) as hour_of_day,
    aqi,
    pm2_5,
    pm10,
    so2,
    no2,
    o3,
    o3_8h,
    co,
    primary_pollutants
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = 9 
    AND timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00' 
    AND timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'

""")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 第四步：获取井陉县基本信息和坐标
query_district = text("""
SELECT id, name, ST_X(coordinate) as longitude, ST_Y(coordinate) as latitude
FROM district WHERE id = 9
""")
df_district = pd.read_sql(query_district, engine)
print("井陉县基本信息：")
print(df_district)

# 第五步：获取井陉县的空气质量站点
query_stations = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, ST_X(aqs.coordinate) as longitude, ST_Y(aqs.coordinate) as latitude
FROM air_quality_station aqs
WHERE aqs.district_id = 9
""")
df_stations = pd.read_sql(query_stations, engine)
print("\n井陉县空气质量站点：")
print(df_stations)

# 第六步：获取井陉县的污染企业分布
query_companies = text("""
SELECT pc.id, pc.name, pc.industry_type, pc.address, 
       ST_X(pc.coordinate) as longitude, ST_Y(pc.coordinate) as latitude
FROM polluting_company pc
WHERE pc.district_id = 9
""")
df_companies = pd.read_sql(query_companies, engine)
print("\n井陉县污染企业：")
print(df_companies)

# 第七步：获取井陉县2025-06-30的排放数据
query_emission = text("""
SELECT nox, so2, pm, hc, nmhc, co, hcl, exhaust_gas
FROM daily_district_emission
WHERE district_id = 9 AND date = '2025-06-30'
""")
df_emission = pd.read_sql(query_emission, engine)
print("\n井陉县2025-06-30排放数据：")
print(df_emission)

# 第八步：获取井陉县2025-06-30的小时风场数据
query_wind = text("""
SELECT wind_speed, wind_direction, wind_degree, wind_scale, timestamp
FROM hourly_district_weather
WHERE district_id = 9 
    AND timestamp >= '2025-06-30 00:00:00' 
    AND timestamp < '2025-07-01 00:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
df_wind = pd.read_sql(query_wind, engine)
print("\n井陉县2025-06-30风场数据：")
print(df_wind)
